title: Finn's Sith apprentice
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Sith |image=[[File:TheApprentice1.jpg]] |name=Finn's Sith apprentice |homeworld= |birth= |death=Before [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],{{CSWECite|I; II|273; 290|Finn (3); Marka}} a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]]{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] |masters=[[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master… that girl… she… uh… I mean…''"
"''She tried a Force mind trick on you? Did you not sense it when they approached? The Force is powerful with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn|}} This '''[[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]''' served as [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He traveled to a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]] with Finn and helped him plant a bomb in a building. After concluding business with an [[Unidentified individual (Finn)|individual]], they destroyed the building and proceeded to the landing pad where Finn's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was located. On the way to the ship, the apprentice [[Death/Legends|murdered]] the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave owner]] [[Lod]] in order to free the indentured female [[Marka]], who was being abused by the Toydarian. Finn promptly rebuked the young man for this act of compassion. After he was struck by Finn, Marka helped him up and attempted to use a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to convince the apprentice to take her with the two [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. He informed Finn, who was already aware of Marka's [[Force-sensitive/Legends|connection]] with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and was instructed to deal with her. However, he did not deal with Marka, and later met Finn at the Sith Master's ship along with the woman. After Finn refused to take Marka with them, Marka seized the apprentice's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and threw him off the landing pad, sending the man plummeting to his death. ==Biography== {{Quote|She's still following us, Master."''
"''I know. Perhaps she is why we came to this dreadful place. There is no such thing as coincidence."''
''I must deal with her."''
"''Yes. Deal with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn, regarding Marka|}} [[File:Finn_hits_apprentice.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The apprentice was rebuked by Finn for assisting the slave Marka.]] This [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] came under the [[Sith training|tutelage]] of the [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He and Finn traveled to a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]] and planted a bomb in a building. After he and his Master concluded business with an [[Unidentified individual (Finn)|individual]], they departed the building and detonated the bomb, destroying the building. As the apprentice and Finn made their way back to the landing pad where their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was located, they encountered the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Lod]] and his [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], a young woman named [[Marka]]. The apprentice came to her defense when Lod struck her as retaliation for refusing to impress the two Sith. As Lod conversed with Finn, he called the apprentice a slave. The man immediately became enraged, igniting his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Death/Legends|ending]] Lod's life, freeing Marka. Finn immediately expressed his disappointment in the apprentice for his role in helping Marka. As the man interrupted, Finn argued that there was no place for compassion from a Sith, and punched the apprentice, knocking him to the ground. As Finn continued to his ship, the apprentice was helped to his feet by Marka, who attempted to use a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to convince the young Sith to take her with him and Finn. He informed Finn that Marka was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and Finn—who had already [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] her strength with the Force—instructed the young man to deal with her. However, the apprentice and Marka followed Finn up the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] which led to the docking pad where Finn's ship was waiting. As the apprentice tried to talk to Finn, Marka begged the Sith Master to take her with them so she could learn the Sith ways. He refused, citing the fact that he already had the young man as his apprentice. Marka seized the apprentice's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and pushed the young man who had freed her from slavery off the landing pad, sending him plummeting to his death. Marka assumed the young man's role as Finn's Sith apprentice. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You will not strike her again. Ever.''"
"''Your slave has a bit of a temper, eh?''"
"''I'm no slave!|The apprentice and Lod|}} [[File:Watch_that_first_step.png|thumb|right|130px|Marka murdered Finn's Sith apprentice]] The apprentice wore a set of [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Sith apparel|robes]] and carried a lightsaber containing a red [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]]. He also had a stone set on his forehead. The apprentice showed compassion by helping Marka to her feet and freeing her from Lod's captivity, though he was also resentful of being called a slave. He was unsure of what to do with Marka after she tried to convince Finn to take her with them. ==Powers and abilities== The apprentice was able to sense Marka's Force-sensitivity. However, he was not immune to her mind tricks. He was capable of utilizing a lightsaber, using the weapon to kill the Toydarian Lod. ==Behind the scenes== Finn's Sith apprentice first appeared in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[The Apprentice (comic story)|The Apprentice]]," which was featured in [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]] and written by [[Mike Denning]]. In the comic, he was drawn by [[David Nakayama]]. The story was later compiled into a trade paperback version and republished in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]''. Plausible stories in [[Star Wars Tales 1|''Star Wars Tales'' 1]]–''[[Star Wars Tales 20|20]]'' were initially viewed as [[Canon|S-canon]] until referenced in a non-''Tales'' source, at which point the subject matter was elevated to C-canon status.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=752#14952461|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-06-04|time=3:05 AM}} The apprentice was mentioned in Finn's and Marka's entries in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', elevating the character's appearance in ''The Apprentice'' to C-canon. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I; II||Finn (3); Marka}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Finn's Sith apprentice}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Finns Schüler |pl=Uczeń Finna }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sith acolytes and apprentices]] [[Category:Sith of the New Sith Wars]]
